'''Mol Arcasite''' was a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who was among the five bounty hunters that were hired by [[Granta Omega]] to capture [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] for a large sum of money. [[Gender/Legends|She]] first attacked them with a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] on [[Ragoon VI|Ragoon-6]], but the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] destroyed her cruiser and Mol was sent packing hastily on her [[Swoop/Legends|swoop bike]]. She did not attack again, however, for Mol knew not to mess with her prey if her first attack failed.

==Personality and traits==
Mol Arcasite was described to be cruel and ruthless, not caring if she had to take away innocent lives to get her prey, nor did she care if she brought back her prey dead or alive.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi]]'' {{Ab|Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
